API_KEY.description: API key for your OpenAI-compatible provider endpoint (e.g. sub2api key)

ZEROCLAW_PROVIDER.description: Provider selector. Use custom endpoint for OpenClaw-compatible gateways

ZEROCLAW_MODEL.description: Model to use on the compatible endpoint

ZEROCLAW_ALLOW_PUBLIC_BIND.description: Allow binding to public interfaces (must be true for Railway)

ZEROCLAW_GATEWAY_HOST.description: Gateway bind address (0.0.0.0 for Railway networking)
